user.title: Connect to Jullix
user.description: Enter your API token from Mijn Jullix → Profiel → API-tokens. We will verify it and list your installations.

data_description.api_token: Paste the JWT from the Jullix portal (treat it like a password).

installations.title: Select installation(s)
installations.description: We found {count} installation(s). Choose at least one to add to Home Assistant.

data_description.install_ids: You can select multiple sites if your account has more than one.

local.title: Jullix-Direct (optional)
local.description: If you have a local Jullix device on your network, you can add it for faster updates merged with cloud data. Leave the field empty to skip—cloud-only works fine.

data_description.local_host: Example: jullix.local or 192.168.1.50. Empty = skip local connection.

reauth.title: Update API token
reauth.description: Your Jullix API token is invalid or expired. Create a new token in Mijn Jullix → Profiel → API-tokens and paste it below.

progress.validate_token: Contacting Jullix and loading your installations…

error.invalid_auth: The API token was rejected. Create a new token in Mijn Jullix → Profiel → API-tokens.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Jullix. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.no_installations: This account has no installations yet in Jullix.
error.no_installations_selected: Select at least one installation to continue.
error.local_connection_failed: Could not reach the local Jullix device. Check the hostname or IP and that the device is on your network.

abort.already_configured: This Jullix account is already configured.
abort.reauth_successful: API token updated. The integration will reload.
abort.not_jullix: This discovered device does not look like a Jullix system.

init.title: Jullix options
init.description: Tune how often data updates and which features create entities. Turning options off reduces clutter and slightly lowers API use.

data.use_local: Merge local Jullix-Direct data when configured
data.enable_insights: Energy insight sensors (self-consumption, solar use, grid share)
data.enable_events: Fire Home Assistant events for charger, battery, and grid changes
data.enable_adaptive_polling: Poll faster while charging or high grid/battery activity
data.enable_charger_session: Charge session and suggestion sensors (extra API calls)
data.enable_session_history: Store short session log in Home Assistant storage

data_description.update_interval: How often Home Assistant refreshes data from Jullix (30–300 seconds). Lower is more responsive; higher reduces load.
data_description.enable_cost: Adds sensors for savings and costs in EUR (when available from your account).
data_description.enable_statistics: Adds total energy statistics when enabled in your Jullix account. More entities and more data per update.
data_description.enable_charger_control: Exposes chargers as switches and control entities. Anyone who can use Home Assistant can start or stop charging—disable if you do not want that.
data_description.enable_plug_control: Exposes smart plugs as switches. Disable if plugs should not be toggled from Home Assistant.
data_description.use_local: When a local host was set during setup, merges live data from your Jullix-Direct device with cloud data for the first configured installation. Requires the local device to be reachable.
data_description.enable_insights: Instantaneous % estimates from power summary (not the same as metered kWh self-consumption).
data_description.enable_events: Automation trigger type jullix_event with a type field (e.g. charger_started).
data_description.enable_adaptive_polling: Uses a 30s interval while active, otherwise your chosen interval.
data_description.enable_charger_session: Fetches installation charge sessions on extended polls.
data_description.enable_session_history: Keeps the last 50 session records under config storage (optional).

set_charger_control.name: Set charger control
set_charger_control.description: Change charger on/off, charging mode, or maximum power for one charger.

installation_id.name: Installation ID
installation_id.description: The Jullix installation ID (same as in your Jullix app / portal).

charger_mac.name: Charger MAC
charger_mac.description: Charger device identifier (MAC or ID shown in Jullix).

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Charging mode: eco, turbo, max, or block.

run_algorithm_hourly.name: Run hourly optimization
run_algorithm_hourly.description: Triggers the Jullix hourly optimization algorithm for an installation.

assign_chargersession.name: Assign charge session
assign_chargersession.description: Assigns a charge session to a charger or car.

charger_mac.name: Charger MAC
charger_mac.description: Optional charger to attach the session to.

car_id.name: Car ID
car_id.description: Optional vehicle ID when assigning by car.

update_tariff.name: Update tariff
update_tariff.description: Updates the energy tariff setting for an installation (e.g. single or dual tariff).

tariff.name: Tariff
tariff.description: Tariff code accepted by Jullix (e.g. single, dual).
